scripts.dev:cloudflare: npm run build:web && npx wrangler dev
scripts.build:cloudflare: npm run build:server && npm run build:web
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: npm run build:cloudflare && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.cloudflare:d1:migrate:local: npm run cloudflare:d1:prepare-import && npm run cloudflare:d1:import:local
scripts.cloudflare:d1:migrate:remote: npm run cloudflare:d1:prepare-import && npm run cloudflare:d1:import:remote
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
